name: tailwind-styled-v4-monorepo
description: Monorepo for tailwind-styled-v4 — compiler-driven, RSC-aware styling

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/analyzer -w packages/animate -w packages/theme -w packages/plugin -w packages/preset -w packages/compiler -w packages/scanner -w packages/engine -w packages/cli -w packages/devtools -w packages/runtime-css -w packages/vite -w packages/vscode -w packages/rspack && npm run build -w packages/next -w packages/core
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w packages/analyzer -w packages/animate -w packages/theme -w packages/plugin -w packages/preset -w packages/compiler -w packages/scanner -w packages/engine -w packages/cli -w packages/devtools -w packages/runtime-css -w packages/vite -w packages/vscode -w packages/rspack && npm run build -w packages/next -w packages/core
scripts.build:stage1: npm run build -w packages/analyzer -w packages/animate -w packages/theme -w packages/plugin -w packages/preset -w packages/compiler -w packages/scanner -w packages/engine -w packages/cli -w packages/devtools -w packages/runtime-css -w packages/vite -w packages/vscode -w packages/rspack
scripts.release:alpha:check: npm run build:packages && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.release:rc:check: npm run validate:final && npm run health:summary
scripts.merge:phase8-9:hint: echo "If GitHub shows conflicts, resolve package.json + engine/scanner tsconfig first, then rerun validate:final and health:summary"
scripts.verify:examples: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run test -w examples/nextjs && npm run test -w examples/vite && npm run test -w examples/rspack && npm run test -w examples/simple && npm run test -w examples/package-frontend
scripts.build:test: npm run build && npm run verify:examples
scripts.v4.2:create:
printf "Use: npx create-tailwind-styled <name> and choose template
"
